name: DEEP SPACES OF SUPRAHYOID HEAD & NECK
definition: lateral to parapharyngeal space triangular-shaped centrally located space; major vertical highway extending from skull middle layer of deep cervical fascia superficial layer of deep cervical fascia lesion in masticator space lesion in pharyngeal mucosal space lesion in parotid space potential space posterior to pharyngeal mucosal space + anterior to prevertebral space; major highway from skull base to T4; posterior to retropharyngeal space
